mapper.select:
select id, username, password, name, phone, create_time from user
and username like concat('%', #{queryVO.username}, '%')
and name like concat('%', #{queryVO.name}, '%')
and phone like concat('%', #{queryVO.phone}, '%')
order by create_time desc limit #{pageNum}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from user
and username like concat('%', #{queryVO.username}, '%')
and name like concat('%', #{queryVO.name}, '%')
and phone like concat('%', #{queryVO.phone}, '%')
